blockingIssues.description: `estimateBatchCost` rejects fractional `tokensPerUser` estimates in `convex/batchGeneration/gridAnchors.ts:74`, making the helper stricter than the feature contract for estimated token budgeting inputs.

`regenerateSyntheticUser` can leave an existing generated user in a failed or partially reset state when the regeneration LLM call fails (`convex/batchGeneration.ts:233`), instead of preserving the previously completed profile.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow repo-specific mission guidance to override the default `bun run test` requirement when the mission explicitly documents a known flaky full-suite validator and provides the approved scoped test command.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission `AGENTS.md` says to run targeted Vitest files because full `bun run test` can hang, but `.factory/skills/pure-logic-worker/SKILL.md` steps 2, 3, and 5 still require the full suite. The `grid-anchor-pure-logic` handoff records that deviation and the reviewer flagged the mismatch as a shared-state gap.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that when mission guidance documents a known unrelated full-suite failure, workers may use the mission-approved scoped validators plus type checks instead of treating the flaky full suite as feature-local validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission `AGENTS.md` documents the BrowserLeaseDO full-suite issue, but `.factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md` step 6 still mandates `bun run test`. The `batch-generation-backend` handoff and scrutiny review both identified this mismatch as the reason the worker had to deviate.
